meta.title: DEF CON 33 - RF Village - So What The Heck Is This Radio Stuff Anyway - Exploding Lemur
meta.description: What is radio? How do those wacky electromagnetic squiggles do the things they do? What are those magic boxes on either side of an RF link? Let's start with the basics of RF and move through antennas and filters then get down with Shannon and Nyquist for modulation, channel capacity, and SDR architecture.
